_rationale: C++ populates tree.root.file_path with the defining file's path (relative to project root). Go emits empty string for this field. Intentional C++ enrichment locked by ServerTest.TreeRootFilePathIsRelativeToProjectRoot. Ignored in parity tier so the rest of the tree shape compares cleanly.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.); this list captures the descriptor-specific drift beyond the universal baseline.
